title: ICRISAT asia center quarterly technical report.July-September 1994
abstract: In accordance with an earlier decision made by C G Center Director ICRISAt has formally submitted The list of 94 896 germplasm ‘Designated Germplasm” accession to be placed under the auspices of the Food Agriculture Organization of the Nation (FAO) in the framework of the “International  undertaking on Plant Genetic Resources” This actions concerns that the CG centers are........
